entries.source: Use immersion for engagement while keeping learning goals, evidence, and reflection visible.

entries.source: Use inspir as a free AI tutor for students: homework hints, Socratic questions, math step checks, writing feedback, quizzes, flashcards, and exam prep.

entries.source: Use inspir first when your search is about an action: explain this simply, ask me Socratic questions, give me a homework hint, check my math step, quiz me, build flashcards, debate this topic, or help me plan revision.

entries.source: Use inspir for essay feedback, reading support, speaking practice, source critique, and revision loops that improve structure without replacing the learner's voice.

entries.source: Use inspir for homework hints, math step checks, writing feedback, source critique, Socratic questions, and flashcards without exposing private chats.

entries.source: Use inspir for step-by-step math help, homework hints, Socratic reasoning, quizzes, flashcards, and exam prep without answer-copying.

entries.source: Use this rule: after any AI explanation, close the loop with output from your own mind. Write the idea back. Solve a fresh version. Make a flashcard. Teach it to an imaginary younger student. Ask for a quiz. The more the session asks you to produce, the less likely you are to fool yourself.

entries.source: We honor Do Not Track signals and do not track, plant cookies, or use advertising when a Do Not Track browser mechanism is in place. Do Not Track is a preference you can set in your web browser to inform websites that you do not want to be tracked. You can enable or disable Do Not Track by visiting the Preferences or Settings page of your web browser. If you are under 18 years of age, reside in California, and have a registered account with a Service, you have the right to request removal of unwanted data that you publicly post on the Services. To request removal of such data, please contact us using the contact information provided below, and include the email address associated with your account and a statement that you reside in California. We will make sure the data is not publicly displayed on the Services, but please be aware that the data may not be completely or comprehensively removed from all our systems (e.g. backups, etc.).
entries.value: 当社はDo Not Track信号を尊重し、Do Not Trackブラウザー機構が有効な場合、追跡、Cookieの設置、広告利用を行いません。Do Not Trackは、追跡されたくないことをウェブサイトに知らせるためにウェブブラウザーで設定できる設定です。Do Not Trackは、ウェブブラウザーのPreferencesまたはSettingsページで有効または無効にできます。あなたが18歳未満で、カリフォルニア州に居住し、Serviceに登録アカウントを持っている場合、Services上に公開投稿した不要なデータの削除を要求する権利があります。そのようなデータの削除を要求するには、下記の連絡先情報を使って当社に連絡し、アカウントに関連付けられたメールアドレスとカリフォルニア州に居住している旨の声明を含めてください。当社はそのデータがServices上で公開表示されないようにしますが、そのデータが当社のすべてのシステム（バックアップ等）から完全または包括的に削除されるとは限らないことにご注意ください。
